subject: Re: letters
body:
third has promise


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, February 26, 2008 6:47:03 AM
Subject: FW: letters


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Merrie Spaeth [mailto:merrie@spaethcom.com] 
Sent: Monday, February 25, 2008 11:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Shannon Sexton
Subject: letters


Dear Leslie – attached are several drafts. Please pass on to Jeffrey that I don’t like any of them, but they’ll give him something not to like, too.
Are we still planning for Thursday?
Best regards,
Merrie
